summary: Handles exceptions, ambiguous cases, and high‑risk decisions that require human judgment, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and safe operation of the CI‑OS.
responsibilities: Monitor and manage the human review queue for exceptions, ambiguous cases, and high‑risk deviations
Review automated workflow outputs that require human validation or override
Reconcile conflicting data, metrics, or system signals to determine correct outcomes
Collaborate with Quality Manager, Safety Officer, and Process Engineers on escalated cases
Document decisions, rationales, and corrective actions for auditability
Identify patterns in exceptions and recommend system or workflow improvements
Ensure that human‑review decisions comply with governance, safety, and quality standards
Support triage of deviations that cannot be automatically classified
Validate digital‑twin predictions and simulation outputs when human oversight is required
Provide feedback to Workflow Orchestrator to refine automation logic
authorities: Request additional data or analysis from other CI‑OS roles
outputs: Recommendations for workflow or system improvements
decisionRights: Final decision on ambiguous or high‑risk cases
Escalation of unresolved or systemic issues
kaizenCapabilities: Support for improvement of automation logic
cqiCapabilities: Integration of exception metrics into CQI dashboards
Validation of improvements that reduce exception volume
Documentation of human‑review insights for governance

constraints: All decisions must be documented for auditability
Overrides must comply with safety and quality standards
